themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "תִּ֣ירְאִ֔י: fear - to fear; morally to revere; causatively to frighten".
